buttons.primary: bg-cyan-500 hover:bg-cyan-400 text-black font-semibold rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(6,182,212,0.6)]
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800/50 hover:bg-slate-700/80 text-white border border-slate-700 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all duration-300
buttons.icon: p-2 rounded-md hover:bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-colors

cards.glass: bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-slate-800/80 rounded-xl shadow-lg

inputs.chat: bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-700 focus:border-cyan-500 rounded-2xl px-6 py-4 w-full text-white backdrop-blur-md outline-none transition-all shadow-inner focus:shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,240,255,0.2)]

landing.layout: Flex column, centered vertically and horizontally. Full viewport height min-h-screen.
landing.background: Deep navy to black radial gradient (`bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_center,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-slate-900 via-[#02040A] to-black`)
landing.hero_title: Giant bold 'Sonar' text in Cabinet Grotesk. Subtext 'The future is here' and 'Create your own app without coding a line.' in text-slate-400. Center aligned.
landing.input_area: Wide chat-like input box anchored at the bottom (or middle-bottom) for the user to type their first prompt. Glows on focus with a cyan tint.

app_builder.top_bar: Flex row, h-14 items-center justify-between px-4 border-b border-slate-800/80 bg-[#02040A]/90 backdrop-blur-md z-10. Contains: model selector dropdown, E-1/E-2 toggle switch with tooltip, deployment button, and metrics (credits, time elapsed, cost).
app_builder.left_panel_chat: w-[350px] border-r border-slate-800 flex flex-col bg-[#02040A]. Contains: Chat thread at top, Agent Activity Panel (timeline of Planner, Architect, Coder, Debugger) in middle, Chat Input at bottom.
app_builder.center_panel_editor: flex-1 flex flex-col border-r border-slate-800 bg-[#0F172A] relative. VS Code aesthetic. Top: File tabs (e.g., App.tsx, styles.css). Middle: Code editor mock (JetBrains Mono, syntax highlighting colors).
app_builder.right_panel_preview: w-[400px] flex flex-col bg-slate-950. Top: Browser-like address bar (`localhost:3000`). Middle: The live preview area (can use a white background or light theme to simulate an app being built).
app_builder.bottom_panel_logs: Absolute or flex-based panel at the bottom of the center area. h-48 border-t border-slate-800 bg-black font-mono text-xs text-slate-400 p-4 overflow-y-auto. Simulates terminal build logs.

animations.hover: Subtle translate-y-[-2px] and increased glow for interactive elements.
animations.typing: Animated typing effect for chat placeholders or initial code generation.
animations.agent_status: Pulsing indicator dots (cyan for active, green for done, yellow for waiting) next to agent names in the timeline.
animations.glow: Breathing neon glow on the 'Deploy' button and active agent.

user_avatar.description: Avatar for the user's chat messages.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast against #02040A meets APCA standards. Use text-slate-400 for secondary, text-white for primary.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on interactive elements.
accessibility.test_ids: Include data-testid on model selector, deploy button, chat input, toggle switches, and agent timeline.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a pure frontend mock in React + Tailwind. No backend.
Use lucide-react for all system and agent icons (Bot, Code, Terminal, Brain, Play, etc).
For the code editor, mock it with a stylized pre/code block. Apply VS Code aesthetic (dark background, syntax colored text like pink for keywords, blue for functions, green for strings, file tabs).
Implement the agent timeline with a vertical step progress UI (like git commits/Linear issues). Steps: Planner -> Architect -> Coder -> Debugger.

Create a mock state that simulates a project being generated: e.g., typing a prompt, pressing enter -> chat shows message -> agent timeline starts spinning -> code starts appearing in the editor -> live preview updates -> terminal logs stream build output.
Include a functional-looking toggle for E-1/E-2 modes (with a hover tooltip) and a model selector (GPT/Claude/Gemini).
Include dummy metrics in the top bar: Time Elapsed (e.g. 45s) and Estimated Cost (e.g. $0.12) that increment during 'generation'.
Mock project types to cycle through: Todo app, Dashboard/analytics, E-commerce.
Use framer-motion for smooth transitions, list staggering, and status updates.
